title: Lightman's Discord Integration
description: Adds server chat and console access and interactions on your servers discord page!
body:
## About:

Lightman's Discord Integration is a server-side Minecraft mod/Discord bot that allows you to access certain Minecraft features from your discord server.

## Important Note:
As of 1.21, LDI will no longer receive any more updates due to my limited development time and a variety of other factors.

## Features:

* Minecraft chat channel in your discord server that allows players to talk in-game from discord.
* Server console channel in your discord server that allows your staff to run commands such as whitelisting or banning players from your discord server.
* Linking players discord accounts to allow you to determine a problematic discord users Minecraft username so that they can be identified appropriately.
* Adds relevant Forge Events so that other mods (such as Lightman's Currency) can register their own Discord Bot listeners.

 

### Setup Guide:

Instructions on how to set this discord bot up for your server can be found [here](https://github.com/Lightman314/Lightmans-Discord-Integration/wiki/Setup-Guide).
